claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Read-only audit of Codex UserPromptSubmit pre-response DinoBrain preflight enforcement. Found that the installed hook is configured and the wrapper/probe path passes, including fail-closed behavior inside the hook, but live verification found no Codex Desktop UserPromptSubmit preflight event for the current prompt or any prompt after 2026-07-07T02:00:00Z. Docs and scripts explicitly acknowledge trust and stale-session reload gaps, so every new Codex user prompt is not mechanically guaranteed to run DinoBrain preflight before response in current-session reload/trust edge cases.
